# LexePub

> Generated by docmd

## Documentation Files

- [C/C++ Adapter](https://nellowtcs.me/lexepub/docs/adapters/c/)
  Integration layer for native applications via Diplomat
- [Rust Adapter](https://nellowtcs.me/lexepub/docs/adapters/rust/)
  Native asynchronous integration for Rust developers
- [WASM Adapter](https://nellowtcs.me/lexepub/docs/adapters/wasm/)
  Cross-platform bindings for browsers and Node.js environments
- [Quick Start](https://nellowtcs.me/lexepub/docs/getting-started/quickstart/)
  Get started parsing EPUB files with LexEpub
- [LexePub](https://nellowtcs.me/lexepub/docs/)
  High-performance, memory-efficient EPUB parsing for multiple runtimes
